rules.description: The bed supplied does not exist.
The ward supplied does not exist.
The facility supplpied does not exist.
The hospital supplpied does nto exist.
The visit number supplpied is invalid.
Patient is not currently in the bed
The departure date supplied is invalid

validations.summary: /// Updates the assessment validation for period. ///

validations.conditions: admission != null | birthRegistrations != null && birthRegistrations.Count > 0 | admission != null

validations.summary: /// Validates if the departure date is before the admission date. ///
/// Validates if the departure date is before the birth date. ///
/// Validates if the departure date is before the last accommodation event. ///
validations.conditions: medicalEventUsages == null || medicalEventUsages.Count == 0 | currentUsageSet != null | currentUsagePeriod != null | currentUsagePeriod.LastUsageAdjustment != null | departureDate < lastEventDate

validations.summary: /// Validates if the departure date is within the retrospective window period. ///

validations.conditions: utilisation == null | resource == null | resource.HospitalUnitId != hospitalUnitId | !utilisation.IsEnabled

chargesLookups == null | chargesLookups.ServiceCategories == null || chargesLookups.ServiceCategories.Count == 0 | !chargesLookups.ServiceCategories.Any(sc => sc.Description == serviceCategoryDescription

accommodationServiceCategoryConfiguration == null || accommodationServiceCategoryConfiguration.AssessmentType != AssessmentTypeCodeData.Acuity | acuities == null && acuityDescription != null | acuities != null && acuityDescription != null && !acuities.Any(a => a.Description == acuityDescription

accommodationServiceCategoryConfiguration == null || accommodationServiceCategoryConfiguration.AssessmentType != AssessmentTypeCodeData.AssessmentScore | !therapeuticAssessmentScore.HasValue | severities == null && !severities.Any( | severities != null && therapeuticAssessmentScore.HasValue && !severities.Any(s => s.MinTherapeuticAssessmentScore <= therapeuticAssessmentScore && therapeuticAssessmentScore <= s.MaxTherapeuticAssessmentScore

assessmentScores == null && assessmentScoreDescription != null | assessmentScores != null && assessmentScoreDescription != null && !assessmentScores.Any(a => a.Description == assessmentScoreDescription

treatments != null && treatments.Any( | treatments == null && treatmentDescription != null | treatments != null && treatmentDescription != null && !treatments.Any(a => a.Description == treatmentDescription
